articles.title: Tesla Boots Bitcoin But Retains Once-Joke Crypto Dogecoin As A Means Of Payment
articles.description: Electric car maker Tesla has removed the source code that once permitted BTC payments. However, the Elon Musk-owned company is retaining the OG meme cryptocurrency Dogecoin (DOGE) as a payment option.
